strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to lead and contribute to complex, scalable platforms including GIS and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong track record in dev-ops, CI/CD, and open-source project maintenance with clear documentation and community impact
concerns: Current title of 'Senior Software Developer' and extensive experience may exceed junior/mid-level role expectations and risk misalignment
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services (ECS/EKS/RDS/S3) as required in job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, diverse fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures with strong dev-ops and open-source contributions, but his senior-level experience and lack of explicit alignment with required tools like PostgreSQL or AWS services raise questions about role fit, while limited German may impact on-site collaboration.
